<ProjectLayout>
- ./demo/ contains the demo code for the project, which includes examples and sample implementations. 
- ./docs/ contains documentation related to the project, such as user guides, API references, and other relevant information.
- ./engine/ includes the core engine or main functionality of the project, which is responsible for the primary operations and features.
</ProjectLayout>

- Read the documentation in the ./docs/ directory to understand the project requirements and specifications.
